initial_program:
% dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, 0, 0) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(0, C, 0) }.

% row and column predicates
row(R) :- input(R, 0, 0).
col(C) :- input(0, C, 0).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% orientation (0=row,1=col), direction, period, two nonzero cells
1 { orient : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { d    : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { K    : 2..20 } 1 :- true.

1 { R0, C0, Color0 } 1 :- input(R0, C0, Color0), Color0 != 0.
1 { R1, C1, Color1 } 1 :- input(R1, C1, Color1), Color1 != 0.

% distinct colours
:- Color0 != Color1.

% condition predicates
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R0 - R) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C0 - C) \ K = 0.

cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R1 - R) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C1 - C) \ K = 0.

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% at most one colour per cell
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, Color1).
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, 0).
:- output(R, C, Color1), output(R, C, 0).

% zero cannot be selected when any condition holds
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond0(R, C).
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond1(R, C).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, 0, 0) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(0, C, 0) }.

% row and column predicates
row(R) :- input(R, 0, 0).
col(C) :- input(0, C, 0).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% orientation (0=row,1=col), direction, period, two nonzero cells
1 { orient : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { d    : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { K    : 2..20 } 1 :- true.

1 { R0, C0, Color0 } 1 :- input(R0, C0, Color0), Color0 != 0.
1 { R1, C1, Color1 } 1 :- input(R1, C1, Color1), Color1 != 0.

% distinct colours
:- Color0 != Color1.

% condition predicates
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R0 - R) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C0 - C) \ K = 0.

cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R1 - R) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C1 - C) \ K = 0.

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% at most one colour per cell
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, Color1).
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, 0).
:- output(R, C, Color1), output(R, C, 0).

% zero cannot be selected when any condition holds
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond0(R, C).
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond1(R, C).

#show output/3.

final_program:
% dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, 0, 0) }.
n_cols(N) :- N = #count{ C : input(0, C, 0) }.

% row and column predicates
row(R) :- input(R, 0, 0).
col(C) :- input(0, C, 0).

output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% orientation (0=row,1=col), direction, period, two nonzero cells
1 { orient : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { d    : 0, 1 } 1 :- true.
1 { K    : 2..20 } 1 :- true.

1 { R0, C0, Color0 } 1 :- input(R0, C0, Color0), Color0 != 0.
1 { R1, C1, Color1 } 1 :- input(R1, C1, Color1), Color1 != 0.

% distinct colours
:- Color0 != Color1.

% condition predicates
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R0 - R) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C0) \ K = 0.
cond0(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C0 - C) \ K = 0.

cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 0, (R - R1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 0, d = 1, (R1 - R) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 0, (C - C1) \ K = 0.
cond1(R,C) :- orient = 1, d = 1, (C1 - C) \ K = 0.

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% at most one colour per cell
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, Color1).
:- output(R, C, Color0), output(R, C, 0).
:- output(R, C, Color1), output(R, C, 0).

% zero cannot be selected when any condition holds
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond0(R, C).
:- output(R, C, 0), not cond1(R, C).

#show output/3.
